dashboard.label: Device
dashboard.description: Vendor-neutral device status — battery level, charge state, charging sessions and hardware info (Wearables data model)
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Device","description":"Ring hardware, firmware, and battery status","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"},"input_person":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Person (temp)","options":{"token":"person","defaultValue":"*","items":[{"label":"All people","value":"*"},{"label":"P001","value":"P001"},{"label":"P002","value":"P002"}]}}},"dataSources":{"ds_battery_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_device wearable_dataset=battery person_id="$person$" | timechart span=1h avg(battery_level) as level","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Battery level trend"},"ds_charging_events":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_device wearable_dataset=battery person_id="$person$" | sort _time | dedup _raw | eval level=battery_level | eval is_charging_evt=if(charging="true" OR on_charger="true", 1, 0) | streamstats reset_on_change=true window=1 current=false last(is_charging_evt) as prev_charging_evt | eval session_start=if(is_charging_evt=1 AND (prev_charging_evt=0 OR isnull(prev_charging_evt)), 1, 0) | streamstats sum(session_start) as session_id | where is_charging_evt=1 | stats earliest(_time) as start_time latest(_time) as end_time earliest(level) as level_start latest(level) as level_end count as samples by session_id | eval duration_min=round((end_time-start_time)/60,1) | eval start_str=strftime(start_time,"%b %d %H:%M") | eval end_str=strftime(end_time,"%b %d %H:%M") | eval level_gained=level_end-level_start | sort -start_time | head 10 | table start_str, end_str, duration_min, level_start, level_end, level_gained | rename start_str as "start", end_str as "end", duration_min as "dur min", level_start as "lvl start", level_end as "lvl end", level_gained as "lvl gain"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Charging sessions"},"ds_ring_config":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_device wearable_dataset=device_config person_id="$person$" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval color=replace(device_color,"_"," "), set_up_at=substr(device_setup_date,1,10) | table color, device_design, device_hw_version, device_fw_version, device_size, set_up_at | rename device_design as design, device_hw_version as "hw ver", device_fw_version as "fw ver", device_size as size, set_up_at as "setup date"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Ring configuration"},"ds_charge_status":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_device person_id="$person$" | eval rc=if(wearable_dataset="device_config",device_color,null()), rd=if(wearable_dataset="device_config",device_design,null()) | eventstats latest(rc) as ring_color, latest(rd) as ring_design | where wearable_dataset="battery" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval level=battery_level, in_charger=on_charger | eval mins=round((now()-_time)/60,0), sync_label=case(mins<60, mins." min ago", mins<1440, round(mins/60,0)." hr ago", true(), round(mins/1440,0)." d ago"), sync_color=case(mins<180,"#4CAF50", mins<720,"#F4A422", true(),"#E8503A") | table level, charging, in_charger, ring_color, ring_design, sync_label, sync_color","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Charge status (ring viz)"}},"visualizations":{"battery_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_battery_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":false,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Battery %"},"title":"Battery Level Trend"},"charging_table":{"type":"splunk.table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_charging_events"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","count":10,"columnFormat":{"start":{"align":"left"},"end":{"align":"left"},"dur min":{"align":"left"},"lvl start":{"align":"left"},"lvl end":{"align":"left"},"lvl gain":{"align":"left"}}},"title":"Recent Charging Sessions"},"config_table":{"type":"splunk.table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_ring_config"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","count":1,"columnFormat":{"color":{"align":"left"},"design":{"align":"left"},"hw ver":{"align":"left"},"fw ver":{"align":"left"},"size":{"align":"left"},"setup date":{"align":"left"}}},"title":"Device Hardware Info"},"chargestatus_viz":{"type":"charge_ring_viz.chargestatus","title":"Charge Status","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_charge_status"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}},"ring_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### About these metrics
- **Charge Status** — current battery level, whether it’s on the charger, and how long since the last sync.
- **Battery Level Trend** — battery percentage over the selected time range.
- **Charging Sessions** — recent charge cycles: when, how long, and % gained.
- **Device Hardware** — model, firmware, size, color and setup date reported by your device.","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"New tab"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"battery_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":400,"y":20,"w":770,"h":360}},{"item":"config_table","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":400,"w":560,"h":220}},{"item":"charging_table","type":"block","position":{"x":600,"y":400,"w":570,"h":220}},{"item":"chargestatus_viz","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":360,"h":360}},{"item":"ring_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":640,"w":1150,"h":210}}],"options":{"width":1180,"height":880,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/wearables/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"globalInputs":["input_person"]}}}}
